description_long: This is a rustic, wooden mug or small barrel-shaped bucket with a cylindrical body constructed from vertical wooden staves. The exterior is reinforced by two wide, dark metal bands encircling the upper and lower portions, giving it a sturdy, medieval appearance. The wood is light brown with visible grain and subtle carved lines, suggesting a hand-crafted or old-fashioned design. A single, thick, angular wooden handle is attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping and carrying. The interior is hollow and open at the top, suitable for holding liquids or small items. There are no visible labels, engravings, or decorative markings on the surface.
description: A rustic, wooden mug or bucket with two dark metal bands and a thick, angular wooden handle. The wood grain and metal reinforcements give it a sturdy, old-fashioned look.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open top, wood grain, and both metal bands, with the handle clearly visible on the right.
description_view_1: The rear view centers the handle, showing its attachment and the continuous metal bands around the body.
description_view_2: The side view displays the handle's full angular shape and the uninterrupted wood and metal banding.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the plain wooden surface and metal bands, with the handle not visible.
